simple_types.name: Set
simple_types.code:
type Set is private
with
  Iterable                  =>
    (First       => First,
     Next        => Next,
     Has_Element => Has_Element,
     Element     => Element),
  Default_Initial_Condition => (SPARKlib_Full => Is_Empty (Set)),
  Aggregate                 => (Empty => Empty_Set, Add_Unnamed => Insert),
  Annotate                  =>
    (GNATprove, Container_Aggregates, "From_Model");

record_types.name: Cursor

subprograms.code: function "-" (Left, Right : Set) return Set
function "=" (Left, Right : Set) return Boolean

documentation.returns:
If two sets are equal, they contain the same elements in the same
order.

If they are different, then they do not contain the same
elements.

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (Container : in out Set; Position : in out Cursor)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
incorrect formatting of "+" eng/ide/gnatformat#221
!format off

!format on

The element at position Position is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are preserved

The elements located after Position are shifted by 1

Position has been removed from Container

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description:
incorrect formatting of "+" eng/ide/gnatformat#221
!format off

!format on

The element at position Position is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are preserved

The elements located after Position are shifted by 1

Position has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Delete
subprograms.code: procedure Delete (Container : in out Set; Item : Element_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
Item is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Item are preserved

The elements located after Item are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description:
Item is no longer in Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Item are preserved

The elements located after Item are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

subprograms.code: procedure Delete_First (Container : in out Set)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
The first element has been removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

Other elements are shifted by 1

First has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Delete_Last
subprograms.code: procedure Delete_Last (Container : in out Set)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
The last element has been removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

Others elements of Container are preserved

Last cursor has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Difference
subprograms.code: function Difference (Left, Right : Set) return Set

documentation.returns:
Elements of the result of Difference are in Left

Elements of the result of Difference are in Right

Elements in Left but not in Right are in the difference

Actual value of elements come from Left

subprograms.name: Difference
subprograms.code: procedure Difference (Target : in out Set; Source : Set)

documentation.description:
Elements of Target were already in Target
Elements of Target are not in Source
Elements in Target but not in Source are in the difference
Actual value of elements of Target is preserved
Mapping from cursors of Target to elements is preserved

subprograms.name: Exclude
subprograms.code: procedure Exclude (Container : in out Set; Item : Element_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If Item is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Item is removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Item are preserved

The elements located after Item are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

parameters.name: Item
parameters.description:
If Item is not in Container, nothing is changed

Otherwise, Item is removed from Container

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Item are preserved

The elements located after Item are shifted by 1

A cursor has been removed from Container

subprograms.name: Find
subprograms.code: function Find (Container : Set; Item : Element_Type) return Cursor

documentation.returns:
If Item is not contained in Container, Find returns No_Element

Otherwise, Find returns a valid cursor in Container

The element designated by the result of Find is Item

subprograms.name: Include
subprograms.code: procedure Include (Container : in out Set; New_Item : Element_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container

Elements are preserved

Cursors are preserved

The element equivalent to New_Item in Container is
replaced by New_Item.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container

Other elements are preserved

New_Item is inserted in Container

The Elements of Container located before New_Item are
preserved.

Other Elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted in Container

parameters.name: New_Item
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container

Elements are preserved

Cursors are preserved

The element equivalent to New_Item in Container is
replaced by New_Item.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container

Other elements are preserved

New_Item is inserted in Container

The Elements of Container located before New_Item are
preserved.

Other Elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted in Container

subprograms.name: Insert
subprograms.code: procedure Insert (Container : in out Set; New_Item : Element_Type)

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
New_Item is inserted in the set

Other mappings are preserved

The elements of Container located before New_Item are preserved

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted in Container

parameters.name: New_Item
parameters.description:
New_Item is inserted in the set

Other mappings are preserved

The elements of Container located before New_Item are preserved

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted in Container

subprograms.name: Insert

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container, it is not modified and
Inserted is set to False.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container and Inserted is set
to True.

Position now maps to New_Item

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are
preserved.

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted at position Position in
Container.

parameters.name: New_Item
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container, it is not modified and
Inserted is set to False.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container and Inserted is set
to True.

Position now maps to New_Item

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are
preserved.

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted at position Position in
Container.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container, it is not modified and
Inserted is set to False.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container and Inserted is set
to True.

Position now maps to New_Item

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are
preserved.

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted at position Position in
Container.

parameters.name: Inserted
parameters.description:
If New_Item is already in Container, it is not modified and
Inserted is set to False.

Otherwise, New_Item is inserted in Container and Inserted is set
to True.

Position now maps to New_Item

Other elements are preserved

The elements of Container located before Position are
preserved.

Other elements are shifted by 1

A new cursor has been inserted at position Position in
Container.

subprograms.name: Intersection
subprograms.code: function Intersection (Left, Right : Set) return Set

documentation.returns:
Elements in the result of Intersection are in Left and Right

Elements both in Left and Right are in the result of
Intersection.

Actual value of elements come from Left

subprograms.name: Intersection
subprograms.code: procedure Intersection (Target : in out Set; Source : Set)

documentation.description:
Elements of Target were already in Target
Elements of Target are in Source
Elements both in Source and Target are in the intersection
Actual value of elements of Target is preserved
Mapping from cursors of Target to elements is preserved

subprograms.name: Symmetric_Difference
subprograms.code: function Symmetric_Difference (Left, Right : Set) return Set

documentation.returns:
Elements of the difference were not both in Left and Right

Elements in Left but not in Right are in the difference

Elements in Right but not in Left are in the difference

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

subprograms.name: Symmetric_Difference
subprograms.code: procedure Symmetric_Difference (Target : in out Set; Source : Set)

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description:
Elements of the difference were not both in Source and in
Target.

Elements in Target but not in Source are in the difference

Elements in Source but not in Target are in the difference

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

parameters.name: Source
parameters.description:
Elements of the difference were not both in Source and in
Target.

Elements in Target but not in Source are in the difference

Elements in Source but not in Target are in the difference

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

subprograms.name: Union
subprograms.code: function Union (Left, Right : Set) return Set

documentation.returns:
Elements of Left and Right are in the result of Union

Elements of the result of union come from either Left or Right

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

subprograms.name: Union
subprograms.code: procedure Union (Target : in out Set; Source : Set)

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description:
Elements already in Target are still in Target

Elements of Source are included in Target

Elements of Target come from either Source or Target

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

Mapping from cursors of Target to elements is preserved

parameters.name: Source
parameters.description:
Elements already in Target are still in Target

Elements of Source are included in Target

Elements of Target come from either Source or Target

Actual value of elements come from either Left or Right

Mapping from cursors of Target to elements is preserved
